description: SQL injection via callee heap mutation. Tests that interprocedural symex propagates callee side-effects (object property writes) back to the caller. Aspirational: requires taint engine to also track cross-function heap mutations.

expected.notes: req.query.name flows through setName into user.name, then into pg.query — callee heap mutation must propagate. Aspirational: taint engine does not yet model callee heap side-effects.
